blocks.content: As the light faded from Ergos's eye and its legs withdrew from the cave walls,
the ground shook with its fall.
The creatures, losing control, began to scatter in all directions.
Screech! Screech!
Without receiving attack commands, they collided with each other and quickly disappeared.
Phew.
Taking a deep breath, Shirone saw a rotating, translucent box in front of Ergos's machine.
It hadn't materialized because the priority for item acquisition hadn't been determined yet.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Michelangelo.
Though he didn't know much about High Gear, he could sense that this was the item he wanted.
Just as he reached for the ornate box, Mafia's group rushed over.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: Wait! Wait a minute!
DexGamsung approached Shirone, looking at the box in disbelief.

blocks.speaker: DexGamsung
blocks.content: It's real. It's really a legendary grade.
Though probability is always a factor, getting it on the first try was unbelievable.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The only legendary item Ergos drops is Michelangelo. If we sell this, the galaxies…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Zeros raced through his mind.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The West Country Free Pass is good, but Michelangelo is far more valuable. If we get this…
Catching Shirone's gaze, he cleared his throat.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ahem, the principle is to distribute galaxies earned from party hunting equally. But items can't be divided, so they don't materialize until the priority is set.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: Priority?

There are two ways. The user can designate it directly, or leave it to chance. Usually, it's the former, but if trust is low, we draw cards. The highest number gets priority, and if they forfeit, it goes to the next.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Then designate me as number one. If you help me get Donatello too, I'll give you the West Country Free Pass.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: Then designate me as number one. If you help me get Donatello too, I'll give you the West Country Free Pass.
Though that was the initial agreement, Mafia's group couldn't help but frown.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: We didn't expect a legendary grade to actually drop.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: They had seen Yahweh2's abilities but didn't think he could control probability too.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Why? Don't you want to give it now?
Saying it outright made it hard to hide their reluctance.

blocks.speaker: Sona
blocks.content: No, but come on! This is a huge jackpot. Isn't it a bit selfish to take it all? We'd compromise if it were reasonable.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: Ergos was Type C, a chase pattern, so you could catch it. You can see bullets and jump through space. If it were Type B, a defense form, your attacks wouldn't have worked.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: So what do you want? I need Michelangelo. What do you want? Galaxies?

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Add galaxies to the West Country Free Pass. If Donatello drops, we'll settle that with galaxies too.
It was unlikely to drop again.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Alright. Let me get Michelangelo first. I'll contact Golden Wheel outside.

blocks.speaker: Sona
blocks.content: No. We'll hold it and settle it later. Golden Wheel might refuse, and you might take it and run to East Country.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That applies to anyone.
Mafia sat down defiantly.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: We won't compromise. Choose wisely. Without setting priority, you can't leave until you disconnect.
Their persistence made Shirone abandon the straightforward approach.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Fine, let's decide by chance. Whoever gets it will be determined by probability.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: Huh?
Mafia's group looked surprised.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Why? It's fair, right? The highest card gets priority.
That's true, but…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It was seven against one.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Is he serious? Only one of us needs to get the highest card. Anyone with a higher card than Yahweh2 will do.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: Accepted. It's reasonable. Everyone agrees?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Everyone nodded.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yahweh2, touch the box. When the method appears, choose random.
They thought he wouldn't get the item, but Shirone followed their words.
Choosing random, augmented reality displayed cards, distributing one to each member.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Let's reveal.
They opened their cards, and Sona clenched his fist in triumph.

blocks.speaker: Sona
blocks.content: Yes! A king!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Wow, high card. Congrats.
His comrades couldn't fully celebrate, not entirely trusting Sona.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: This is intense.
Shirone stared at the blinking card in front of him.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What are you waiting for? Open it. We don't have time.
In his focused state, Shirone's senses sharpened, and the truth of this world flowed in.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Here.
At the point chosen by his quantum signal, he opened the card, and the atmosphere chilled.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: An ace?

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: How… an ace? This is an ace…
Knowing he still needed them, Shirone feigned a cheerful smile.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Haha! I'm really lucky today. Maybe I'll get Donatello too.
Item acquisition priority determined. 1st: Yahweh2, 2nd: Sona, 3rd: …

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Acquire.
As the box materialized, a wooden gauntlet-shaped part landed in Shirone's hand.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Wood?
It was a unique material in High Gear.

blocks.speaker: Sona
blocks.content: You! That…
As Sona began to speak, the cave brightened, enveloped in a pale glow.
Event concluded.
When his vision returned, Shirone found himself back at the entrance to Ergos's sanctuary.

blocks.speaker: Sona
blocks.content: Don't equip that! Once you equip it, you can't trade it!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Equip.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Oh…
As Shirone chose to equip it, Michelangelo cracked and emitted a bright light.
With a pop, the form shattered, and particles of light enveloped Yahweh2's right arm.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What is this?
As the light faded, a metallic gauntlet with an ivory sheen replaced his right hand.

blocks.speaker: Sona
blocks.content: Oh no, once it's bound, it won't drop as loot. Is he really going to run?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ugh, a legendary item at level 100. You should equip it when you're a ranker. What if you get assassinated and lose it?

blocks.speaker: Sona
blocks.content: But how do you use this?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Anyway, this…
As Shirone extended Michelangelo, Mafia's group approached with interest.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Legendary items have common traits. They're not in metallic form when acquired. Once equipped, they can't be traded. And they perform independently of output.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: And Michelangelo's function is…
Holding Michelangelo with both hands, Sona examined it.

blocks.speaker: Sona
blocks.content: Ah, this must be it. I've heard Michelangelo is a photon regulator. It has destructive power with light.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: A photon cannon.
Following the explanation, Shirone activated the part with his palm up, and the lens lit up.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Huh? Whoa?
Mafia's group quickly stepped back, watching the light gather above his palm.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Wow.

blocks.speaker: Sona
blocks.content: This is difficult. Like all legendary items, it doesn't generate power on its own but manipulates something. Skill is more important than level.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That's why it ignores output.
As Shirone shook the light, getting a feel for it, Mafia clicked his tongue.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: That's why I said not to equip it. Now you can't hand it over to the guild. Still, we need to settle…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: So that's how it works.
Recalling the feel of the photon cannon, the light quickly compressed into a sphere.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What's that?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The fierce light looked ready to explode.
I compressed the light. I don't know the principle in High Gear, but anyway, like this…
As Shirone aimed Michelangelo with a feeling of release, a flash struck a distant rock.
Boom!
With a deafening roar, a shockwave of wind revealed a cratered ground.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Oh my.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: Light explodes? That's a missile!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It was a blade to pierce the Operator.
As Mafia's group still stared at the destroyed spot, they quickly adjusted their expressions.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Anyway, congratulations. Your skill is undeniable. Now, let's settle. Can you contact Golden Wheel?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: No. We'll settle after finding Donatello. Let's move to the next hunting ground quickly.

blocks.speaker: DexGamsung
blocks.content: Hey! What do you mean? We don't know when Donatello will drop. Are you saying we should keep going until then?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That was the agreement from the start. You've broken everything so far, so at least keep this. Otherwise, I won't settle either.

blocks.speaker: DexGamsung
blocks.content: Ugh!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Damn! We're stuck. If he runs to East Country, we get nothing.

blocks.speaker: Sona
blocks.content: Will you really settle if we find Donatello? Promise here and now, okay?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: They break promises like it's nothing.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I don't want to clash with other West Country users.
Having made his decision, Shirone equipped Booster from the selective options.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Alright. Let's head back to Democracy. I'll wait at the Mid Gear station.
Activating Booster, the rocket engine ignited, and Yahweh2's machine shot into the sky.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: …He's gone.

blocks.speaker: DexGamsung
blocks.content: Wait, did he run away?

blocks.speaker: DexGamsung
blocks.content: He said he'd wait at Mid Gear, so we have to trust him. Even settling Michelangelo can upgrade all our parts. We can't give up here.

blocks.speaker: Sona
blocks.content: Let's go. Our output is higher, so we won't lose him if we chase now.
Rumble!
Looking back at the noise, Shirone saw Mafia's group following from a distance.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: They should have been more honest.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He stuck out his tongue playfully.
